_comment: Model routing harness budget caps (Phase 1/2 -- read by src/routing_budget.py, no versioned/audited UI yet, that's spec Section 19 and out of scope for this pass). Hard blocks only, no approval-gate: a run either fits under these caps or gets status=budget_blocked, overridable per-run only via `odysseus-run --allow-premium` for the premium-specific caps.
